sections.heading: Page 1
paragraphs:
AI INTAKE RISK ASSESSMENT CHECKLIST
Page 1 | v1.0
Stakeholder Input Template | Complete all sections before governance sign-off
USE CASE NAME What is this AI tool / feature / model called? OWNER Who is the named responsible owner?
(Name / Title)
BUSINESS UNIT Which team or department is sponsoring this? MODEL TYPE n GenAI n Predictive ML n Rules +
ML n Vendor Feature
DEPLOYMENT n Internal n Customer-facing n GO-LIVE TARGET Target launch date
Public-facing
JURISDICTIONS Countries / regions this will operate in ASSESSMENT DATE Date of this assessment
A) Risk Scoring | Score each driver 0–3: 0 = None / N/A · 1 = Low · 2 = Medium · 3 = High
Risk Driver Score (0–3) Notes / Evidence
1. Decision Impact
eligibility / pricing / hiring / claims / benefits
2. Autonomy
human-in-loop vs automated action
3. Data Sensitivity
PII / PHI / PCI / minors / biometrics
4. Security Exposure
integrations, tool use, write-access, data retrieval
5. Regulatory / Contract
privacy laws, sector rules, customer commitments
6. Bias / Discrimination
protected classes, disparate impact
7. Transparency Need
explainability, disclosures, contestability
8. Reliability Risk
hallucinations, accuracy, drift, edge cases
9. Vendor / Supply Chain
retention, training use, subcontractors, audit rights
10. Reputational Risk
brand exposure, harmful content
TOTAL SCORE / 30
CONFIDENTIAL — For internal governance use only | 0 = None/N/A 1 = Low 2 = Medium 3 = High

sections.heading: Page 2
paragraphs:
AI INTAKE RISK ASSESSMENT CHECKLIST
Page 2 | v1.0
Stakeholder Input Template | Complete all sections before governance sign-off
B) "Auto-High" Triggers — tick any that apply fi any n automatically sets tier to HIGH
n Automates or materially influences decisions about people (employment, credit, claims, pricing, eligibility)
n Uses regulated data (PHI / PCI) or sensitive personal data (biometrics / minors)
n Public-facing or customer-facing generative output
n Connects to internal systems with write access or broad data retrieval
n Vendor terms unclear on data retention / training or no audit / incident rights
n No logging / monitoring feasible (can't measure failures or usage)
C) Risk Tier Determination — tick the applicable tier
n Low: Total score 0–9 AND no Auto-High triggers
n Medium: Total score 10–19 AND no Auto-High triggers
n High: Total score 20–30 OR any Auto-High trigger checked
Required Approver(s) — tick all
n Compliance n Security n Legal / Privacy n Risk / ERM
that apply:
D) Required Artifacts by Tier — check off each item before launch
Tier 1 — LOW (required for all tiers)
n Use Case Summary (purpose, users, workflow, boundaries)
n Data Sheet (data types, sources, retention, access)
n Vendor / Model Facts (who, where hosted, version)
n Basic Security Review (access control, least privilege)
n Evaluation Plan — Lite (basic accuracy / prompt tests for GenAI)
n Monitoring Plan — Lite (usage logging + incident route)
n Human Oversight Statement (who reviews outputs, when)
Tier 2 — MEDIUM (adds to Low)
n DPIA / Privacy Impact Assessment (or equivalent)
n Threat Model — Lite (prompt injection, data leakage, abuse paths)
n Model Card — Standard (intended use, limits, risks, training data summary)
n Evaluation Plan — Standard (quality, bias checks, red-team prompts for GenAI)
n Monitoring Plan — Standard (drift / hallucination tracking, alerts, review cadence)
n Human-in-the-Loop Design (decision points, override, escalation)
n Third-Party Risk Review (DPA, retention, subprocessors, incident notification, audit rights)
Tier 3 — HIGH (adds to Medium)
CONFIDENTIAL — For internal governance use only | 0 = None/N/A 1 = Low 2 = Medium 3 = High

sections.heading: Page 3
paragraphs:
AI INTAKE RISK ASSESSMENT CHECKLIST
Page 3 | v1.0
Stakeholder Input Template | Complete all sections before governance sign-off
n Formal Risk Assessment Memo (what can go wrong + mitigations + residual risk)
n Full Threat Model & Security Test Evidence (abuse testing, prompt injection defences, access controls)
n Bias / Fairness Assessment (if people-impacting) + mitigation plan
n Explainability & Notice Plan (disclosures, contestability / appeals if relevant)
n Robust Evaluation Report (benchmarks, failure modes, acceptance thresholds)
n Operational Readiness Plan (SOPs, incident runbook, rollback plan, model change control)
n Monitoring & Audit Evidence Plan (logs, retention, periodic review schedule)
n Legal Review Sign-off (contracts, regulatory obligations, customer commitments)
E) Launch Decision
Decision: n Go n Conditional Go n No-Go
Conditions (if Conditional Go):
Next Review Date:
Reassessment Trigger(s): model change / new data source / new geography / new feature or integration
Assessed by: Date: Signature:
_____________________________ ____________________ _____________________________
CONFIDENTIAL — For internal governance use only | 0 = None/N/A 1 = Low 2 = Medium 3 = High
